revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Coronation]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Coronation]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[:en:Throne|Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[:en:Tiara|Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[:en:Throne|Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}

|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]

|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[:en:Tiara|Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[:en:Throne|Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[:en:Tiara|Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[:en:Throne|Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[:en:Tiara|Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]

|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[:en:Tiara|Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[:en:Throne|Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]

|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[:en:Tiara|Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[:en:Throne|Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist

|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Coronation here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Coronation for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox |name = Coronation |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |title = [[:en:Coronation|Coronation]] and [[enthronement]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[:en:Regalia|Regalia]] |list1 = * [[Crown]] * [[Coronation crown]] * [[Crown jewels]] * [[Diadem]] * [[:en:Tiara|Tiara]] * [[:en:Armill|Armill]] * [[Ring (jewellery)|Ring]] * [[Globus cruciger|''Globus cruciger'' (orb)]] * [[:en:Sceptre|Sceptre]] * [[:en:Sword|Sword]] * [[Mantle (royal garment)|Mantle]]
|group2 = {{hlist |Items |rituals}} |list2 = * [[:en:Throne|Throne]] * [[:en:Anointing|Anointing]] * [[Enthronement]] * [[Investiture]]
|group3 = By continent |list3 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *[[Coronations in Africa|Africa]] *[[Coronations in the Americas|the Americas]] *[[Coronations in Asia|Asia]] *[[Coronations in Europe|Europe]] *[[Coronations in Oceania|Oceania]]
|group4 = Specific customs |list4 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Coronations in antiquity|Antiquity]] ** [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Ancient Egyptian]] * [[Coronation of the Bohemian monarch|Bohemian]] * [[Coronation of the Emperor of Brazil|Brazilian]] * [[Coronation of the British monarch|British]] * [[Coronation of the Bulgarian monarch|Bulgarian]] * [[Coronation of the Burmese monarch|Burmese]] * [[Coronation of the Byzantine emperor|Byzantine]] * [[Coronation of Bokassa I and Catherine|Central African]] * [[Coronation of the Danish monarch|Danish]] * [[Inauguration of the Dutch monarch|Dutch]] * French ** [[Coronation of the French monarch|royal]] ** [[Coronation of Napoleon and Joséphine|Napoleon]] * [[Coronation of the Holy Roman Emperor|Holy Roman]] * [[Coronation of the Hungarian monarch|Hungarian]] * [[Rājyābhiṣeka|Indian]] * [[Enthronement of the Japanese emperor|Japanese]] * [[Installation of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong|Malaysian]] * [[Coronation of the Nepalese monarch|Nepalese]] * [[Coronations in Norway|Norwegian]] * [[:en:Sword of Osman|Ottoman]] * [[Papal coronation|Papal]] * [[Coronations in Poland|Polish]] * [[Coronation of the Russian monarch|Russian]] * [[Coronation of the Serbian monarch|Serbian]] * [[Coronation of the Swedish monarch|Swedish]] * [[:en:Coronation of the Thai monarch|Thai]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[:en:Pretender|Pretender]] ** [[List of heads of former ruling families|List of current]] * [[Papabile]] * [[:en:Order of succession|Order of succession]] * [[Coronation anthem]]
}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
